name: Suspicious Autorun Registry Key Creation of Powerpoint File in Uncommon Path
description: Detects suspicious autorun registry key creation of PowerPoint in uncommon path that is being used for wineloader malware in APT29 Phishing Campaign.

filterSets.name: Suspicious Autorun Registry Key Creation of Powerpoint in Uncommon Path

author: Jehhan Marcelo & Felix Gregorio III
